subcodes.first_line: O daughter of Ḥá! The Lord of Names maketh mention of thee from His Most Great Prison. Verily thy Lord is the Mighty, the All-Wise. We have remembered thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا بنت حا یذکرک مالک الاسماء من شطر سجنه الاعظم ان ربک لهو العزیز الحکیم انا ذکرناک
subcodes.subjects: @eulogies; reminiscences, @praise and encouragement, @prayer for praise and gratitude, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness
